Instructions: Complete all fields. This form is pre-populated where possible from Forhemit's transaction files. Verify all values before submission. Attach supporting documents per the checklist in Section 06.
§ 01Borrower Information

{{address}}

§ 02Loan Request
{{loanAmount}}
SBA 7(a)
{{loanPurpose}}
{{loanTerm}}
§ 03Financial Summary
Note: All figures below are based on QofE-adjusted trailing twelve months (TTM) unless otherwise noted. Supporting QofE report is attached.
{{revenue}}
{{ebitda}}
{{dscr}}
§ 04Ownership Structure

Current ownership structure and proposed post-ESOP structure.

Pre-Transaction: List all owners with 20%+ ownership, their percentage stake, and role in the company.
Post-Transaction: The ESOP trust will acquire 100% of the outstanding equity. The trustee will hold shares on behalf of eligible employees per the plan document.
§ 05Sources & Uses of Funds
Sources:
{{loanAmount}}
Uses:
§ 06Required Documents Checklist

The following documents must accompany this intake form. Check each item when attached.

Federal tax returns — business (last 3 years)
Federal tax returns — personal, all guarantors (last 3 years)
Year-to-date financial statements (balance sheet and income statement)
Accounts receivable and payable aging schedules
Quality of Earnings (QofE) report
Independent appraisal (fair market value)
ESOP plan document (draft or final)
Trust agreement
Articles of incorporation / organization
Operating agreement or bylaws
Business licenses and permits
Insurance certificates (key man, general liability, property)
Environmental report (if applicable)
Franchise agreement (if applicable)
Repurchase obligation study
—Borrower Certification

The undersigned certifies that all information provided in this form and accompanying documents is true, accurate, and complete. The borrower understands that any material misrepresentation may result in denial of the loan application or revocation of any commitment.

{{companyName}}
Authorized Signatory
